name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 23 Jun 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.108"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"When making changes to a sales order and then changing the status, you will now be notified that the changes will be lost. You'll then have the opportunity to go back and save the changes before changing the status."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Sort code data for Direct Freight has been updated to the latest information."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where unapproved sales orders couldn't be changed to Pick status."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in eBay where empty compatibility information returned an error when listing. The empty field will now be ignored when listing products."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
